parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the flanger. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the modulation effect.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls the amount of feedback in the effected signal.
parameters-en.Manual: Controls the degree of phase shifting. Has no effect when Depth is set to 100%.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
